expectations.text: Points to papers/<paper_dir>/debug/ for diagnostic artifacts
expectations.evidence: Lists tab_NNN.json, tab_NNN.tex, tab_NNN.log, tab_NNN.stdout/stderr in papers/<paper_dir>/debug/

expectations.text: References latex-failure-patterns.md or common failure patterns
expectations.evidence: References reference/latex-failure-patterns.md checklist and categorizes failures (Undefined control sequence, File not found, Extra alignment tab, resizebox wrapping)

expectations.text: Mentions regression verification on previously-working papers
expectations.evidence: Explicitly says to re-run a previously-working paper with --force --rerender-tables and check standard tabular, resizebox, pgfplotstable table types
